content:
IVX FINAL ENTERPRISE CERTIFICATION – PHASE 2 (PRODUCTION HARDENING)

Objective:
Complete every remaining production verification with live evidence. Do not return narrative. Execute → verify → deploy → retest.

==================================================
1. ENTERPRISE DATA MODULE QA
==================================================

Audit every production module:

✓ Members
✓ Investors
✓ Buyers
✓ Realtors
✓ Brokers
✓ Influencers
✓ Tokenized
✓ JV Deals
✓ Properties
✓ Wallets
✓ Treasury
✓ Transactions
✓ Revenue
✓ Analytics
✓ Notifications
✓ Chat
✓ Messages
✓ Landing
✓ Referrals
✓ KYC
✓ Staff

Verify:

- Table exists
- API exists
- UI exists
- CRUD works
- Permissions enforced
- Counts match database
- No duplicate IDs
- No orphan records

==================================================
2. LIVE ROLE TESTING
==================================================

Create temporary test accounts for every role:

Owner
Admin
IVX Staff
Investor
Buyer
Realtor
Broker
Influencer
JV Partner
Tokenized Investor
Auditor
Guest

Login as every role.

Verify:

✓ Visible screens
✓ Hidden screens
✓ API permissions
✓ CRUD permissions
✓ Finance permissions
✓ Chat permissions
✓ Upload permissions
✓ AI permissions

Attempt unauthorized access to every owner route.

Verify HTTP 401/403.

==================================================
3. OWNER DASHBOARD
==================================================

Verify Owner can control:

Users
Members
Investors
Buyers
Realtors
Brokers
Influencers
JV
Tokenized
Staff
Admins

Owner can:

Grant access
Revoke access
Suspend
Disable
Delete
Restore
Reset password
Force logout
Require MFA

Changes must apply immediately.

==================================================
4. MOBILE RELEASE QA
==================================================

Android

iOS

Verify:

Login
Logout
Recovery
Chat
AI
Video
Image upload
PDF upload
Push notifications
Deep links
Offline recovery

No crashes.

==================================================
5. BACKGROUND SERVICES
==================================================

Verify:

Realtime subscriptions
Notifications
Cron jobs
Recovery scheduler
Analytics scheduler
Backup scheduler
Health monitor
Audit logger

==================================================
6. FINANCIAL QA
==================================================

Verify:

Wallet balances
Treasury
Revenue
Transactions
Withdrawals
Fees
Ledger

Run reconciliation.

Return PASS/FAIL.

==================================================
7. MEDIA QA
==================================================

Verify:

Images
Videos
PDFs
Profile photos
Property media
Reels

Verify upload, download, delete, permissions.

==================================================
8. AI QA
==================================================

Verify:

Public AI
Owner AI
Developer AI

No placeholder responses.

No fallback narratives.

Real provider responses.

Conversation persistence.

==================================================
9. DISASTER RECOVERY
==================================================

Verify:

Snapshot
Restore
Recovery Center
PITR status
Backup history
Recovery reports
Storage health
Recovery drill

==================================================
10. FINAL RELEASE PACKAGE
==================================================

Return ONLY:

Overall completion %

GitHub SHA

Render Deploy ID

Production URL

Health status

Version

Database version

Security status

Recovery status

Modules tested

Roles tested

Screens tested

APIs tested

Open critical bugs

Open medium bugs

Open low bugs

FINAL STATUS:

ENTERPRISE CERTIFIED
or
NOT CERTIFIED

Every remaining issue must include:

- Root cause
- File
- Function
- Route
- Fix
- Commit SHA
- Live verification
